title: CSIR NAL Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 04 Project Assistant, Project Associate Posts
description: The CSIR National Aerospace Laboratories (CSIR NAL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 04 Project Assistant I, Project Associate I, II Jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th pass, ITI, Any Degree, Post-graduation, B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Mechanical Engineering can apply for the CSIR NAL Notification 2026.
